    know about us

    Chitzo inu dApp

    Chitzo Inu, a leading decentralized application, offers a variety of ways to grow your digital assets. Our platform features comprehensive investment tools including staking, yield farming, cryptocurrency mining. Additionally, we ensure user convenience with straightforward options for depositing and withdrawing funds
    Features
    BURN TO EARN
    Burn $Chitzo token
    Start earning     Chitzo Swap
    Swap any token on BNB
    Chain in seconds     chitzo Card
    Load your Chitzo and other cryptos
    onto a virtual prepaid card spent in fiat     Free Token Locker
    Lock Tokens and
    LP tokens for FREE!     Farming
    Farming Made Easy for
    holders and projects     AI Mining

    CHITZO INU AI MINING

    At Chitzo Inu, our developers have leveraged the power of Artificial Intelligence (AI) to create a unique and intelligent system that simplifies the complexities of cryptocurrency mining. This state-of-the-art system autonomously selects optimal mining strategies without any need for user intervention. How It Works Users simply select the quantity of tokens they wish to burn. From there, our system automatically begins mining exclusive tokens, effectively regenerating them. This innovative approach not only provides a continuous passive income for life but also automatically manages membership permissions based on a sophisticated analysis of market conditions, token availability, market size, and token pricing. Smart Market Management Our system ensures sustainable market growth and continuous price appreciation of tokens by maintaining a careful balance. It will not produce additional tokens if the market is saturated, thus preventing inflation. The strategy adapts dynamically to market changes, ensuring long-term stability and growth.

    roadmap

    The adoption of cryptocurrencies has increased, and the origin of this platform was created based on the idea of utilizing them. Our development concept and business plan is as follows.

    Phase 1

    • Deploy Smart Contract
    • $chitzo token launch
    • Community formation
    • Marketing ramp up
    • Chitzo Presale
    • Launch dApp

    Phase 2

    • DEX Listing
    • TOP 15 CEXes Listing
    • Top influencer partnership
    • Community Partnerships

    Phase 3

    • 100,000+ Holders
    • TOP 5 CEXes Listing
    • Roadmap expansion v2

    Risk Warning

    Trading crypto assets involves significant risk and can result in the loss of your capital. You should not invest more than you can afford to lose and you should ensure that you fully understand the risks involved. Before trading, please take into consideration your level of experience, investment objectives, and seek independent financial advice if necessary.
